recalls.Description: The Yetonamr Pull String Teething Toy has been recalled due to safety concerns related to choking. This toy features an off-white disc shape with a red or blue ball at the center and six colorful silicone pull strings. Additionally, it includes three free-spinning rings and soft push buttons. The product packaging displays the model number 688-59.
recalls.Title: Yetonamr Pull String Teething Toy Recall Due to Choking Hazard
recalls.ConsumerContact: For further assistance, please reach out to Longyanguiheng via email at yetonamr_recall@163.com.

Images.Caption: Recalled Yetonamr Pull String Teething Toy – blue
Recalled Yetonamr Pull String Teething Toy – blue
Recalled Yetonamr Pull String Teething Toy – red
Recalled Yetonamr Pull String Teething Toy – red

Injuries.Name: CPSC is aware of 32 choking incidents.

Retailers.Name: Available online at Amazon.com from June 2025 to October 2025, priced between $10 and $16.

Importers.Name: Longyan Xinluo District Guiheng E-Commerce Co. Ltd., dba Longyanguiheng, of China

Hazards.Name: Choking hazard due to silicone strings that can become lodged in the throat, leading to respiratory distress or death.

Remedies.Name: Immediately discontinue use, remove the toy from children, and contact Longyanguiheng for a full refund. Cut and discard all silicone strings, mark the toy as "DESTROYED," and email a photo of the destroyed toy to yetonamr_recall@163.com.

recalls.metaDescription: Yetonamr Pull String Teething Toy recalled due to choking hazards. Learn how to get a refund and ensure safety for your child.

recalls.Description: Tegu has issued a recall for their Magnetic Floating Stackers, specifically model numbers STA-BGY-801T (Rainbow) and STA-BTP-806T (Big Top). These wooden toys feature a base, six colorful stacking pieces, two posts, and two figures, all connected by magnets. Notably, the products lack any identifying markings.
recalls.Title: Tegu Recalls Magnetic Floating Stackers Due to Ingestion Risk; Serious Injury or Death Possible
recalls.ConsumerContact: Consumers should immediately remove the toys from children and reach out to Tegu at 877-Tegu-Toy (877-834-8869) from 10 a.m. to 7 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday. For further details, email service@tegu.com or visit https://tegu.com/pages/recall or www.tegu.com and select 'Recall' at the top of the page.

Products.Name: Magnetic Floating Stackers
Products.NumberOfUnits: 22,850 (In addition, about 1,977 in Canada and about 190 in Mexico)

Images.Caption: Recalled Magnetic Floating Stackers toy, model STA-BGY-801T (Rainbow)
Recalled Magnetic Floating Stackers toy, model STA-BTP-806T (Big Top)

Injuries.Name: The firm has received 31 reports of magnets separating from the toy stacker. No injuries have been reported.

Manufacturers.Name: Tegu Holdings Inc., of Naples, Florida

Retailers.Name: Available at toy, children's, and specialty stores across the nation, as well as online at Tegu.com and Amazon.com from August 2018 through April 2025 for approximately $40.

Hazards.Name: Ingestion hazard due to magnets that can detach, posing serious health risks including intestinal blockage and potential death.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should cease use immediately and contact Tegu for a free replacement.

recalls.metaDescription: Tegu recalls Magnetic Floating Stackers due to a serious ingestion hazard. Contact Tegu for a free replacement.

recalls.Description: The recall pertains to Xylolin peg doll sets that include nine colorful peg dolls and a wooden base designed for them. These toys are identified by the model number SD13, which is labeled on the packaging. The design poses a serious choking hazard for young children due to the spherical ends of the dolls, which can obstruct airways and lead to fatal outcomes.
recalls.Title: Xylolin Peg Doll Toy Sets Recalled Due to Choking Hazard Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: Consumers should immediately remove the toy from children, dispose of it, and send a photo to Babywants for a full refund. For assistance, contact Babywants via email at recall@twoodtoy.com or visit www.xylolintoys.com/pages/recall-page.

Images.Caption: Recalled Xylolin peg dolls and pedestal toy set
Recalled Xylolin peg dolls with pedestal toy set - packaging
"Model SD13" is printed on a white label located on the side of the product packaging

Retailers.Name: Available exclusively on Amazon.com from May 2021 to January 2025 for approximately $20.

Importers.Name: Taizhoushi Ermu Jinchukou Co., Ltd., dba Babywants, and owner of the Xylolin brand, of China

Hazards.Name: Choking hazard due to the peg dolls' spherical ends blocking airways.

Remedies.Name: Immediate removal and disposal of the product; submit a photo for a full refund.

recalls.metaDescription: Important recall of Xylolin peg doll sets due to choking hazards. Immediate action required for safety.

recalls.Description: Deals Oasis is recalling the Kids Thrill Shape Sorter Car Toys, model number MZL-038, due to a choking hazard. These toys, packaged in a box labeled "Kids Thrill 2 in 1 Shape Sorter Car," include two wooden mallets and various wooden shapes such as balls, stars, and hearts. The car's base features a label indicating the manufacturer, BEDLEE BARGAIN, INC., based in Brooklyn, NY, along with the batch number and production date.
recalls.Title: Deals Oasis Recalls Kids Thrill Shape Sorter Car Toys Due to Choking Hazard
recalls.ConsumerContact: Consumers can reach out to Deals Oasis at shapesorterrecall@gmail.com for guidance on returning the product and obtaining a full refund.

Products.Name: Kids Thrill Shape Sorter Car Toys

Images.Caption: Bottom Label on Recalled Shape Sorter Toy

Retailers.Name: Available online at www.amazon.com from October 2023 to January 2025 for approximately $12

Importers.Name: Deals Oasis of New York, New York

Hazards.Name: Choking hazard due to small parts

Remedies.Name: Immediate cessation of use and return for a full refund

recalls.metaDescription: Deals Oasis recalls Kids Thrill Shape Sorter Car Toys due to choking hazard. Learn how to return for a refund.
